title: Amplify Folded Task Graph
description: The folded (human-authored, machine-dumped) task graph that scripts/concurrency.mjs ingests. Each node is one 'implement-and-audit' task; the engine explodes it into <id>.impl and <id>.audit subnodes. Implementer/auditor model and tools are NOT stored here -- execute-plan chooses them at spawn time per the role design guidelines.

nodes.description: The folded tasks. Task ids must be unique; every dep must reference an existing task id; the dependency graph must be acyclic.

id.description: Unique task id. Must not contain '.', which the engine reserves as the subnode separator (<id>.impl / <id>.audit).

deps.description: Task ids this task depends on. A successor's implementer waits until every dependency's auditor has passed.

acceptance_criteria.description: Independently checkable statements that define done. The auditor verifies each against evidence.

audit_level.description: 1 = Opus blind subagent audit. 2 = external agent (Codex) audit, degrading to Opus when Codex is absent.

human_gate.description: Optional. When true, this task requires a human verification gate before it is considered complete.

max_attempts.description: Maximum implement->audit attempts before the task is marked 'failed' (logged, non-halting).
